title: senecio lusitanicus
intro: Senecio lusitanicus, also known as Lusitanian ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Senecio lusitanicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
